issues.message: Not part of public API. ActionsCell is not exported from the package entry point (src/index.ts) and cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'. It is an internal component.
Not part of public API. BaseSort is not exported from the components barrel (components/index.ts) nor from the package entry point (src/index.ts). It is an internal component used by BaseHeaderCell.
Wrong export name. The component is exported as 'ExperimentalRowLink', not 'RowLink'. The import statement should be: import { ExperimentalRowLink } from '@gravity-ui/table'.

Wrong export name. The hook is exported as 'experimentalUseColumnsAutoSize', not 'useColumnsAutoSize'. The import statement should be: import { experimentalUseColumnsAutoSize } from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. useDraggableRowStyle is not exported from the package entry point (src/index.ts). It is only in the internal hooks barrel.
Not part of public API. useSortableList is not exported from the package entry point (src/index.ts). It is only in the internal hooks barrel.
Not part of public API. useRowSelectionFixedHandler is not exported from the package entry point (src/index.ts). It is only in the internal hooks barrel.
Not part of public API. BaseCell is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseDraggableRow is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseFooterCell is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseFooterRow is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseHeaderCell is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseHeaderRow is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseResizeHandle is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseRow is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. BaseSortIndicator is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. DragHandle is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. RowActions is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. SelectionCheckbox is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. SortableList is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API. SortableListDndContext is exported from the components barrel but NOT from the package entry point (src/index.ts). Cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.
Not part of public API as a component (only type BaseGroupHeaderProps is exported from package entry). BaseGroupHeader component cannot be imported from '@gravity-ui/table'.

Props are incomplete. SelectionCheckbox extends CheckboxProps from @gravity-ui/uikit via React.forwardRef, accepting all Checkbox props (size, qa, title, value, etc.), not just the 5 listed (className, checked, indeterminate, onChange, disabled).

Props are incomplete. RangedSelectionCheckbox extends Omit<CheckboxProps, 'onChange'>, so it accepts all CheckboxProps except onChange (checked, indeterminate, disabled, size, qa, etc.), not just cellContext and className.
Props are incomplete. RowLink accepts all props from the GravityUI Link component (Parameters<typeof Link>[0]), not just href. This includes children, target, rel, className, etc.

Props are incomplete. Table extends BaseTableProps, so it inherits all BaseTable props (stickyHeader, stickyFooter, withHeader, withFooter, emptyContent, rowVirtualizer, renderGroupHeader, etc.) in addition to its own size/verticalAlign props. Only 12 of ~40+ props are listed.
Props are incomplete. BaseSort extends Omit<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>, 'className' | 'onClick'>, so it accepts all span HTML attributes in addition to header, className, and children.

Props description is slightly misleading. BaseDraggableRow extends BaseRowProps (inheriting all BaseRow props), not just the 6 props listed. The interface is: BaseDraggableRowProps<TData> extends BaseRowProps<TData>.
